title: roezliella malleifera
intro: Roezliella malleifera, also known as Roezliella, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, which comprises citrus and related plants. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Roezliella include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Roezliella can be made into teas, infusions, or oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
